allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; node --version)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5199 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false }; Write-Output "killed vite on 5199" } else { Write-Output "no listener on 5199" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5199 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false }; Write-Output "killed leftover vite on 5199" } else { Write-Output "port 5199 clean" })
